# @platform/contracts-analytics

Analytical query and event contract package for ClickHouse-backed reporting and event analytics.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/contracts-analytics
Version: 0.1.0
Component: contracts-analytics
Type: api
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: analytics
Bounded context: analytics-contracts
Owner: team-data
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: contract
Class: active.contract
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-data
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own analytical event contracts and query-result contracts
- Define compatibility expectations for ClickHouse-backed analytical reads
- Separate analytical contracts from transactional profile/configuration storage

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not execute ClickHouse queries
- Does not own user-facing workflow composition
- Does not write transactional profile configuration

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by workflow, GraphQL, analytics adapter, and test packages through public exports

## Operational notes

- Analytics contracts describe generic analytical capability and do not assume a product domain
